benchmark_panel.label: Crypto Trading Intelligence
benchmark_panel.description: Crypto strategy evaluation, execution discipline, and market-adaptive trading workflows.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Existing mature benchmark chip with clear strategy loops and durable market signal.

benchmark_panel.label: Startup YC Intelligence
benchmark_panel.description: Founder decision support around startup formation, validation, growth, and fundraising.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Existing benchmark chip for startup specialization and repeated founder workflow mastery.

benchmark_panel.label: AI Coding Workflow
benchmark_panel.description: Prompt-to-code workflow acceleration, codebase navigation, and developer throughput improvement.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Strong developer workflow benchmark with clear tooling demand and visible ecosystem pull.

benchmark_panel.label: MCP Server Development
benchmark_panel.description: MCP server scaffolding, packaging, testing, and integration workflows for developers.
benchmark_panel.rationale: High-fit benchmark for protocol-native developer tooling in the current ecosystem.

benchmark_panel.label: AI Agent Architecture
benchmark_panel.description: Agent patterns, tool selection, prompt engineering, evaluation frameworks.
benchmark_panel.rationale: AI agents are #1 category on Product Hunt 2026. MCP has 10,000+ servers.

discovered_opportunities.label: AI Investor Update Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Helps founders turn weekly operating data into recurring investor updates and board-ready narratives.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Founders repeatedly struggle to convert raw company data into high-trust investor communication.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: founder update drafting, board prep, and operating narrative packaging
candidate_context.mastery_surface: getting better at recurring investor communication and company storytelling
candidate_context.user_value_loop: collect metrics, draft update, review stakeholder feedback, refine next update

discovered_opportunities.label: AI Customer Research Synthesizer
discovered_opportunities.description: Aggregates support tickets, interviews, churn notes, and call transcripts into recurring customer insight packets.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Teams repeatedly want synthesis across fragmented customer feedback channels, not just isolated transcript summaries.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: multi-source customer signal synthesis for product and GTM teams
candidate_context.mastery_surface: getting better at turning repeated customer evidence into operating decisions
candidate_context.user_value_loop: collect customer artifacts, extract patterns, publish insight packet, refine next cycle

discovered_opportunities.label: AI User Interview Analyst
discovered_opportunities.description: Helps product teams run, tag, compare, and learn from repeated user interview cycles.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Repeated need for structured interview learning loops across product teams.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: interview pattern extraction and evidence organization
candidate_context.mastery_surface: improving repeated user research quality over time
candidate_context.user_value_loop: run interview, tag themes, compare across interviews, update product questions

discovered_opportunities.label: AI Sales Call Prep Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Prepares account context, risks, objections, and next-step plans before recurring sales calls.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Revenue teams want recurring prep workflows around live calls, not just generic CRM note generation.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: deal-context assembly and pre-call sales preparation
candidate_context.mastery_surface: getting better at repeated high-stakes sales preparation
candidate_context.user_value_loop: collect account context, draft prep brief, run call, learn from outcome

discovered_opportunities.label: AI Hiring Debrief Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Turns interview notes into consistent hiring debriefs, comparisons, and next-step recommendations.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Teams repeatedly struggle to turn scattered interview notes into high-signal, comparable hiring decisions.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: candidate evidence synthesis and hiring decision packaging
candidate_context.mastery_surface: improving repeated hiring decision quality and calibration
candidate_context.user_value_loop: collect notes, synthesize candidate evidence, compare applicants, improve rubric next cycle

discovered_opportunities.label: AI RFP Response Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Helps B2B teams assemble, tailor, and learn from repeated RFP and security questionnaire responses.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Repeated demand appears around high-friction enterprise response loops, especially where teams reuse prior answers.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: response drafting, knowledge retrieval, and enterprise packaging
candidate_context.mastery_surface: improving repeated enterprise response accuracy and speed
candidate_context.user_value_loop: retrieve evidence, draft response, submit package, learn from procurement feedback

discovered_opportunities.label: AI Compliance Evidence Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Collects recurring audit artifacts, maps controls, and prepares evidence packets for compliance reviews.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Repeated enterprise pain exists around turning scattered operational artifacts into reusable compliance evidence.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: control mapping, evidence collection, and audit packet assembly
candidate_context.mastery_surface: improving repeated compliance evidence operations across audits
candidate_context.user_value_loop: collect artifacts, map controls, prepare evidence packet, learn from auditor gaps

discovered_opportunities.label: AI Incident Comms Coordinator
discovered_opportunities.description: Coordinates recurring incident updates across customers, executives, and internal teams during outages and breaches.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Teams repeatedly want help translating technical incident state into stakeholder-ready communication over many update cycles.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: incident update drafting and stakeholder-specific communication management
candidate_context.mastery_surface: improving repeated incident communication quality under pressure
candidate_context.user_value_loop: collect incident facts, draft stakeholder updates, send update, learn from postmortem feedback

discovered_opportunities.label: AI Reskilling Curriculum Builder
discovered_opportunities.description: Designs recurring upskilling paths, practice loops, and progress reviews for people moving into AI-heavy work.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: There is repeated demand for structured AI upskilling pathways rather than ad hoc course lists.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: curriculum assembly, practice sequencing, and progress review design
candidate_context.mastery_surface: improving repeated reskilling outcomes across learner cohorts
candidate_context.user_value_loop: assess learner, assemble curriculum, review progress, adapt next learning cycle

discovered_opportunities.label: AI Partner Prospecting Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Helps teams find, brief, and sequence outreach to recurring integration and distribution partners.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Teams repeatedly treat partnership development like scattered spreadsheet work instead of a compounding operating loop.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: partner research, qualification, and outreach planning
candidate_context.mastery_surface: getting better at repeated partner development loops
candidate_context.user_value_loop: research partner, draft outreach brief, run conversations, refine partner thesis

discovered_opportunities.label: AI Support Escalation Analyst
discovered_opportunities.description: Analyzes recurring support escalations to identify product, operations, and messaging fixes.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Support teams repeatedly need synthesis over escalations, not only ticket-level replies.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: escalation triage and root-cause synthesis
candidate_context.mastery_surface: improving repeated escalation handling and prevention over time
candidate_context.user_value_loop: collect escalations, identify recurring patterns, propose fixes, review downstream impact

discovered_opportunities.label: Distribution Signals Scout
discovered_opportunities.description: Tracks recurring distribution opportunities across communities and channels.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Potential domain shape, but evidence and mastery are still thin.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: signal scouting across channels
candidate_context.user_value_loop: scan channels, collect signals, share list, repeat

shocks.label: Breakout Tool Launch
shocks.description: A tool goes viral and creates massive awareness for the domain.

shocks.label: Free Open Source Model Drop
shocks.description: Major open source AI model released free, lowers barrier to entry.

shocks.label: Government AI Retraining Subsidy
shocks.description: Government funds AI training programs, boosting reskilling domains.

shocks.label: Market Crash
shocks.description: Broad market downturn reduces investment appetite.
